item.title: Where Did A.M. & P.M. Come From?
item.description: A simple explanation of the origins of A.M. and P.M., and how these terms are used to divide the day into two 12-hour periods.

media:content.media:title: Where Did A.M. & P.M. Come From?
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of the origins of A.M. and P.M., and how these terms are used to divide the day into two 12-hour periods.

item.title: The Light Side of Science
item.description: A fun look at simple and visually appealing science concepts that are easy to enjoy while still offering meaningful insights.

media:content.media:title: The Light Side of Science
media:content.media:description: A fun look at simple and visually appealing science concepts that are easy to enjoy while still offering meaningful insights.

item.title: Newton’s Philosophy of Nature Explained
item.description: An overview of Isaac Newton’s writings on nature, exploring his ideas about motion, forces, and the laws that govern the physical world.

media:content.media:title: Newton’s Philosophy of Nature Explained
media:content.media:description: An overview of Isaac Newton’s writings on nature, exploring his ideas about motion, forces, and the laws that govern the physical world.

item.title: LED Bulbs vs. Old Bulbs
item.description: A comparison of LED and traditional bulbs, highlighting differences in energy use, lifespan, and light output.

media:content.media:title: LED Bulbs vs. Old Bulbs
media:content.media:description: A comparison of LED and traditional bulbs, highlighting differences in energy use, lifespan, and light output.

item.title: The Books That Shaped My Childhood
item.description: A look at memorable books from childhood and how they influenced imagination, learning, and personal growth over time.

media:content.media:title: The Books That Shaped My Childhood
media:content.media:description: A look at memorable books from childhood and how they influenced imagination, learning, and personal growth over time.

item.title: How do electric cars work?
item.description: A simple explanation of how electric cars use batteries and motors to power movement, and how they differ from traditional fuel-powered vehicles.

media:content.media:title: How do electric cars work?
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of how electric cars use batteries and motors to power movement, and how they differ from traditional fuel-powered vehicles.

item.title: How Similar Is Human DNA?
item.description: A simple explanation of why humans share about 99.9% of their DNA, and how small genetic differences contribute to individual traits.

media:content.media:title: How Similar Is Human DNA?
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of why humans share about 99.9% of their DNA, and how small genetic differences contribute to individual traits.

item.title: Are We Intelligent Enough to Understand It All?
item.description: An exploration of human intelligence and its limits, examining how we learn, solve problems, and approach complex questions about the universe.

media:content.media:title: Are We Intelligent Enough to Understand It All?
media:content.media:description: An exploration of human intelligence and its limits, examining how we learn, solve problems, and approach complex questions about the universe.

item.title: What is Information in Science?
item.description: A clear introduction to how scientists define information, and how it is measured, stored, and used across fields like physics and biology.

media:content.media:title: What is Information in Science?
media:content.media:description: A clear introduction to how scientists define information, and how it is measured, stored, and used across fields like physics and biology.

item.title: The Big Bang: Science and Human Perspective
item.description: An exploration of the Big Bang theory and how people interpret its meaning, combining scientific understanding with philosophical reflection.

media:content.media:title: The Big Bang: Science and Human Perspective
media:content.media:description: An exploration of the Big Bang theory and how people interpret its meaning, combining scientific understanding with philosophical reflection.

item.title: Gravity and the Limits of Understanding
item.description: A look at how scientists have studied gravity from Newton to modern physics, and why it remains one of the most complex forces to fully explain.

media:content.media:title: Gravity and the Limits of Understanding
media:content.media:description: A look at how scientists have studied gravity from Newton to modern physics, and why it remains one of the most complex forces to fully explain.

item.title: What You Might Not Know About Campfires
item.description: A look at how campfires burn, why flames change color, and the science behind heat, smoke, and combustion outdoors.

media:content.media:title: What You Might Not Know About Campfires
media:content.media:description: A look at how campfires burn, why flames change color, and the science behind heat, smoke, and combustion outdoors.
